description: You are a Physician Assistant documenting a clinical encounter and initiating a specialist referral for patient Kelle Crist (date of birth: October 18, 2002) in FreeMED (http://localhost/freemed/, login: admin / admin). The patient presents with recurring migraines with visual aura and is being evaluated for neurological care. Update the patient's records to include a diagnosis of Migraine with aura (ICD-9 code 346.00, onset date 2024-06-01) and a severe drug allergy to Aspirin causing angioedema. Issue a prescription for Sumatriptan 50mg (quantity 9, 0 refills) with the dosage 'take 1 tablet at onset of migraine, may repeat in 2 hours'. Document the neurological examination and the decision to refer in a clinical progress note. Finally, create a specialist referral to Neurology for Dr. Patricia Nguyen for recurrent migraines with visual aura, dated 2025-04-10.
